title: Biggest Acquisition Of Adani Group | Ambuja Cement & ACC For 80,000 Crores | #ShareMarket
description:
Adani Group wins the race to buy Swiss cement major Holcim's stake in Ambuja cement and ACC Ltd for $10.5 billion (around Rs 81,361 crore)
In this video, we have done a complete #FundamentalAnalysic of #AmbujaCement & have also discussed whether you should add this stock to your portfolio. Whether we should invest in Ambuja cement & acc & if yes then what should be the target price. Everything we have discussed.
